summary: UI/UX & Explainability Overhaul Testing Complete. All 10 features to test PASSED. The Analysis (training results) and Predictions sections now have color-coded metric cards with hover tooltips, plain-English summaries, dynamic prediction forms, improved chart headers, overfitting detection in Train vs Test comparison, and color-coded leaderboard scores.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - Loaded Loan Approval dataset and trained a model. Training results show color-coded MetricCards with green/sky-blue borders and 'Excellent'/'Good' quality labels

TEST 2: PASSED - Hovered over Info icon next to Accuracy metric - tooltip appeared with plain-English explanation: 'Percentage of predictions that were exactly correct. 100% = every prediction was right.'
TEST 3: PASSED - Training results header shows plain-English summary: 'Your classification model was trained on 20 samples in 0.00s. The best algorithm is Random Forest with 100.0% accuracy.'

TEST 4: PASSED - Charts have improved headers with CardDescription. Example: 'These metrics show how accurately Random Forest predicts on 4 unseen test samples. Green = great, amber = okay, red = needs improvement.'
TEST 5: PASSED - Train vs Test comparison table has 'Metric', 'Train', 'Test', 'Gap' columns. Gap shows values like '+0.9pp' for R2, '-3404.09' for MAE
TEST 6: PASSED - Predictions tab shows dynamic form with labeled input fields for each feature (size, bedrooms, age, location_score) instead of JSON textarea

TEST 7: PASSED - Filled in prediction form values (size=2000, bedrooms=3, age=5, location_score=8) and generated prediction. Result shows in styled card with large value '413959.6309' and Input Summary
TEST 8: PASSED - Leaderboard entries have color-coded score text - '100.00% acc' displayed in green/emerald, '75.00% acc' in sky-blue

TEST 9: PASSED - Classification dataset (Loan Approval): Confusion matrix has updated header with explanation about green diagonal cells = correct predictions. Classification metrics have color coding.
TEST 10: PASSED - Regression dataset (House Prices & Insurance Costs): Actual vs Predicted and Residual charts show green dashed reference lines. Chart headers explain what each visualization shows.
critical_code_review_comments: METRIC_EXPLANATIONS constant (lines 27-35) correctly defines explanations for all metrics: r2, mae, rmse, accuracy, precision, recall, f1
getScoreColor function (lines 37-43) correctly returns color classes based on score thresholds: >=0.9 emerald (Excellent), >=0.7 sky (Good), >=0.5 amber (Fair), <0.5 red (Needs Work)
MetricCard component (lines 1005-1026) correctly implements color coding, Info icon with hover tooltip, and quality labels
predictionFormData state (line 757) correctly replaced old predictionInput for dynamic form
handlePredict function (lines 960-977) correctly builds row from form data and generates prediction
Train vs Test Comparison table (lines 1433-1448) correctly calculates Gap with overfitting detection (red highlight if gap > 15pp)
Prediction form (lines 1505-1537) correctly renders labeled inputs for numeric features and dropdowns for categorical features
Prediction result card (lines 1539-1566) correctly shows large value display with Input Summary
Leaderboard (lines 1482-1492) correctly color-codes scores using getScoreColor function
Chart CardDescriptions provide clear plain-English explanations for what each visualization shows
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: Loan Approval (classification - 20 rows, target=approved), House Prices (regression - 15 rows, target=price), Insurance Costs (regression - 20 rows, target=charges)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX & Explainability Overhaul fully verified. Key features tested: 1) MetricCards with color-coded borders (emerald/sky-blue/amber/red) based on score thresholds - data-testid='metric-{key}' for accuracy, precision, recall, f1, r2, mae, rmse. 2) Hover tooltips on Info icons showing METRIC_EXPLANATIONS content. 3) Plain-English summaries in training results header. 4) Dynamic prediction form with labeled inputs - data-testid='predict-input-{col}' for numeric inputs and categorical dropdowns. 5) Train vs Test Comparison with Gap column - data-testid='train-test-comparison'. 6) Color-coded leaderboard scores using getScoreColor function. 7) Improved chart headers with CardDescription elements. 8) Green reference lines in Actual vs Predicted (diagonal) and Residual (horizontal at 0) charts.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All UI/UX & Explainability features working correctly
